panels.description: This plot shows the average time (in milliseconds per second) that an average validator spends per consensus processing scope
panels.title: Core Task Execution Time per Scope (m)

panels.description: Displays the average execution time (in seconds) per task call, computed as the rate of total processing time divided by the rate of task invocations over a 5-minute window. Data is grouped by task label and hostname using Prometheus histogram metrics (scope_processing_time_sum / scope_processing_time_count).
panels.title: Number of tasks in the queue

panels.description: Average reason for block creation
panels.title: Reason for block creation

panels.description: Measures how many subdags are included in each consensus commit.
panels.title: Subdags per commit count

Block headers in bundle to be sent to the core

panels.description: Number of bundles that contain invalid header per sender
panels.title: bundles_with_invalid_headers

panels.description: The current number of reconstructed transactions which are unknown to the DAG state
panels.title: Reconstructed, but unknown to DAG state

panels.description: Displays the rate of live block fetches initiated by each host, aggregated across all authorities. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how many blocks it pulls from peers per second. Useful for detecting imbalances or overactive fetchers
panels.title: Live Fetch Rate per Host

panels.description: Displays the rate of live block fetch requests initiated by each host, aggregated across all authorities. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how many blocks it pulls from peers per second. Useful for detecting imbalances or overactive requester.
panels.title: Live Request Rate per Host

panels.description: Displays the rate of live block fetches authored from each authority, aggregated across all hosts. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how often its blocks needs to be fetched.
panels.title: Live Fetch Rate per Authority

panels.description: Displays the rate of live block requests authored from each authority, aggregated across all hosts. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how often its blocks is requested.
panels.title: Live Request Rate per Authority

panels.description: Number of currently active periodic fetch scheduler tasks.
panels.title: Fetch Scheduler Inflight

panels.description: Rate of periodic sync request per block author
panels.title: Periodic Syncing Fetches Overview

panels.description: Displays the rate of periodic block fetches initiated by each host, aggregated across all authorities. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how many blocks it pulls from peers per second. Useful for detecting imbalances or overactive fetchers
panels.title: Periodic Fetch Rate per Host

panels.description: Displays the rate of periodic block fetches initiated by each host, aggregated across all authorities. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how many blocks it pulls from peers per second. Useful for detecting imbalances or overactive fetchers
panels.title: Periodic Requests Rate per Host

panels.description: Displays the rate of periodic block fetches authored from each authority, aggregated across all hosts. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how often its blocks needs to be fetched.
panels.title: Periodic Fetch Rate per Authority

panels.description: Displays the rate of periodic block requests authored from each authority, aggregated across all hosts. This helps monitor the overall load each node contributes to the synchronization process by tracking how often its blocks needs to be fetched.
panels.title: Periodic Requests Rate per Authority

panels.description: Rate of live sync request per block author
panels.title: Live Syncing

panels.description: This metric tracks the average number of referencing blocks per missing block. It reflects how many other blocks are waiting on missing data to be processed.
panels.title: Ancestor-to-Missing Block Ratio

panels.description: Displays the top 5 authorities whose blocks most frequently lack required ancestors, based on the 5-minute rate. High rates may indicate improper block propagation or network delays.
panels.title: Top 5 Authorities Causing Missing Ancestors

panels.description: Current number of ongoing fetch tasks.
panels.title: consensus_commit_sync_inflight_fetches

panels.description: Rate of number of commits fetched from other authorities.
panels.title: commit_sync_fetched_commits

panels.description: Rate of counts instances where commit sync couldn’t proceed due to a gap in block sequence
panels.title: Commit Sync Gap Retries

panels.description: Average fetch commits from a peer authority.
panels.title: Commit Sync Fetch Once Latency

panels.description: Number of pending commit ranges queued for fetch.
panels.title: commit_sync_pending_fetches

panels.description: Rate of fetch failures per authority and error type.
panels.title: Commit Sync Fetch Errors

panels.description: This metric calculates, for each authority, the fraction of 2-minute intervals over the past 24 hours in which the authority committed at least one consensus message.
panels.title: Consensus Reliability (24 hour)

panels.description: Rate of total number of committed consensus messages
panels.title: Committed Messages Rate

panels.description: Summing up bandwidth used by all requests and responses - inbound and outbound.
panels.title: Consensus Bandwidth Usage
